nodes.x: Behold, I say unto you that you shall let your time be devoted to the studying of the scriptures, and to preaching, and to confirming the church at Colesville, and to performing your labors on the…

1. Behold, I say unto you, that you shall let your time be devoted
    to the studying of the Scriptures, and to preaching, and to
    confirming the Church at Colesville, and to performing your labors
    on the land, such as is required, until after you shall go to the
    west to hold the next conference; and then it shall be made known
    what you shall do.

Behold, I say unto yon, that you shall let your time be devoted to the studying of the Scriptures, and to preaching, and to confirming the Church at Colesville, and to performing your labours on the land, such as is required, until after you shall go to the west, to hold the next Conference, and then it shall be made known what you shall do. And all things shall be done by common consent in the…
And all things shall be done by common consent in the church, by much prayer and faith, for all things you shall receive by faith. Amen.
For all things must be done in order, and by common consent in the church, by the prayer of faith.
